detailedDescription: The ROG Strix X370-F Gaming motherboard features the AMD X370 chipset with AM4 socket support. This ATX form factor board supports up to 64GB of DDR4 RAM across 4 slots. Equipped with PCIe 3.0 expansion slots, 2 M.2 slots, and 8 SATA ports for extensive storage options. Connectivity includes USB 3.1 Gen 2 ports and is ideal for enthusiasts and gamers seeking high-performance features.
additionalSpecs: AM4 | AMD X370 Chipset | ATX | 4x DDR4 Slots (Max 64GB) | 2x M.2 Slots | 8x SATA Ports | USB 3.1 Gen 2
